# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Recursive Discovery, §Distributed Component Metadata
# Covers: --recurse walks the tree, picks up .components.json at multiple depths,
# combines with --input, applies --filename override.

mkdir libs
mkdir libs/libmqtt
mkdir src
mkdir src/cjson
mv root.json .components.json
mv libmqtt.json libs/libmqtt/.components.json
mv cjson.json src/cjson/.components.json

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -r . -o out.json

# All 3 components present
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] | sort == ["cjson","libmqtt","libtls"]' out.json

# --filename override: discover only files named my-deps.json
mv libs/libmqtt/.components.json libs/libmqtt/my-deps.json
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -r . --filename my-deps.json -o out_custom.json
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] == ["libmqtt"]' out_custom.json

# --input + --recurse combined: explicit file + discovered files
mv libs/libmqtt/my-deps.json libs/libmqtt/.components.json
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i src/cjson/.components.json -r libs -o out_combo.json
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] | sort == ["cjson","libmqtt"]' out_combo.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- root.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "libtls", "version": "3.9.0", "type": "library", "license": "ISC",
      "supplier": {"name": "OpenBSD"},
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}]
    }
  ]
}
-- libmqtt.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "libmqtt", "version": "4.3.0", "type": "library", "license": "EPL-2.0",
      "supplier": {"name": "Acme"},
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "2222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}]
    }
  ]
}
-- cjson.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "cjson", "version": "1.7.17", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name": "Dave Gamble"},
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "3333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}]
    }
  ]
}
